title: Sumerian/Akkadian: Letters from Mari
description: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: Letters from Mari.
introduction: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: Letters from Mari.

translation.text: From 'Letters from Mari': One of the 117 major literary works of ancient Mesopotamia, recorded on clay tablets in cuneiform script and preserved in the great libraries of Sumer, Akkad, Babylon, and Assyria.
